key_assessments: Eligibility verification; demographics; baseline labs; PD-L1/biomarkers; medical history; ECOG; vitals
notes: Eligibility must be confirmed before randomisation. PD-L1 TPS ≥50% required. Biomarker panel mandatory.

key_assessments: First dose; baseline labs; vitals; physical exam; disposition; AE baseline; concomitant meds
notes: 2:1 randomisation (torivumab 200 mg IV Q3W vs placebo). ECOG must be 0-1.

key_assessments: Dosing; vitals; adverse events; concomitant meds
Dosing; vitals; adverse events; concomitant meds
End-of-Cycle 1; labs (haematology/chemistry); cumulative AE review; dose modifications
Cycle 2 start; dosing; vitals; adverse events; concomitant meds
notes: Day 22 = start of Cycle 2 per Q3W schedule

key_assessments: End-of-Cycle 2; labs; cumulative AE review; dose modifications
Repeat Q3W dosing visits through Cycle 35 (~2 years)
notes: Each cycle = 21 days. Window ±3 days from scheduled cycle day.

key_assessments: End-of-cycle assessment; labs; cumulative AE review
Tumour assessment CT/MRI; RECIST 1.1 response; baseline target lesion confirmation
notes: First post-baseline imaging. Window ±3 days at Wk 6.

key_assessments: Tumour measurements; RECIST 1.1 overall response
Tumour measurements; RECIST 1.1 overall response
Tumour measurements; RECIST 1.1 overall response; transition to Q12W schedule after Wk 18
Tumour measurements Q12W; RECIST 1.1 overall response
notes: Continues until disease progression or EOT. Window ±7 days.

key_assessments: Final safety labs; final vitals; final PE; disposition (completion/discontinuation reason); final AE collection
notes: ±3 days from 30 days post last dose

key_assessments: Safety follow-up; survival status; AE outcome collection
Safety follow-up; survival status
Safety follow-up; survival status; late AE collection
Vital status; disease status (phone contact)
notes: Every 12 weeks by phone until end of study or death. Minimal data collection.

key_assessments: Cause of death; date; circumstances
notes: Complete if subject dies on-study or within follow-up period.
